transcript.text:
I'm here at Gokseong County today
[Because the weather was good...]
[Because the weather was bad...]
[She's here to try their representative food: The Goblin Meal]
How can she eat that much?
[What are we even watching right now?]
[Tzuyang made an appearance Gokseong!]
[Gokseong's "Goblin Meal" mukbang starting now!]
[This place welcomes you with its beautiful weather]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Gokseong today
I was invited here last year before
I remember eating their briquette-grilled beef and it was amazing
I got invited here once again
I went to a lot of restaurants last time
So I'll be doing the same by visiting several restaurants here

Let's go to our first one
[Me Ran Myung Ga] [Jeolla Province, Gokseong-gun]
-Hello -Hello, welcome, nice to meet you
It's Tzuyang!
What's the Goblin Meal?
Gokseong is known as a tourist spot famous for the train village and the rose garden
But we don't really have a representative food
So we use our local specialties like pork, melon, and taro
to make a meal for our family and friends
That's how the Goblin Meal came to a start
-So there's black pig and also beef? -Yes
Then...
3 servings of charcoal beef
2 servings of black pig
Can you eat this much?
I have to go eat elsewhere, so I'm only eating a little bit

-I'll have those out for you -Thank you
[Gokseong's representative food]
[Goblin Meal]
[Gokseong is also known for their black pigs]
[Side dishes all made with Gokseong's local specialties]
That's a lot of side dishes
I thought this was cucumber, but it's melon
I see a lot of taro and melon
Taro leaf?
That's almost like seasoned bracken
But it has a different consistency Crunchy and delicious
It's good
I'll try this first since it's the main menu
The fat is crunchy because it's a black pig
I'm loving the sauce
[Cute]

Melon sauce
It has a scent of a wasabi
It goes well together
[Wrap with taro leaf]
[Grill the beef too]
This is fried taro
I thought it was going to be a little weird at first
But it tastes like a mix of potatoes and sweet potatoes
It's burning!
No, no Don't burn
Taro leaf
Bean sprouts
Melon sauce
Rice and stew Thank you
You can make bibimbap (mixed rice) with the side dishes here later if you want
The portions are great

Thank you
[This this this]
[The melon sauce is strong]
[Am I crying...?]
It tastes good, but the wasabi is strong
I love the skin on it
[So happy to witness this in person]
Kimchi on top
It's hot
It's unimaginable
How can she eat that much?
[That's what I'm saying]
I thought it was a lie
But she really is eating it all
Let's make the bibimbap now
I was told to put these 2 sauces

[Gochujang (chili paste) sauce]
[Soy sauce]
[Mix mix]
They give big portions
Delicious
Let's put some pork on here
Meat bibimbap
[She's now concentrated on eating because the food is good]
[Finished with the first meal] [Pork & Beef Goblin Meal]
My daughter is your subscriber
Leave me an autograph
Thick and chewy pork
With great seasoning
That was a lot more food than I expected
But I'm not full yet
So let's head to our next spot

[Where will her 2nd destination be?]
I'm at the 2nd restaurant
Goblin Meal
A lot of items on their menu
Fried rice sounds good too
[Sangseon Nara & Danbi] [Jeolla Province, Gokseong-gun]
-Are you the owner here? -Yes
3 servings of the Goblin Meal
2 servings of the stir-fried seafood
Gap Jju Sae? [Cuttlefish, Webfoot Octopus, Shrimp]
-I've heard that you're very pretty in person -Really?
Thank you
[Cuttlefish, Webfoot Octopus, Shrimp]
[Put them on the grill after seasoning]
[Stir-fried seafood]
[Get some onions on the hot grill]

[Top it off with black pig pork]
[Torch it up for smokey flavor]
[Goblin Meal]
This is the Gap Jju Sae
I came up with it to represent our county
The customers love it
The Goblin Meal looks different here
[Every restaurant has its own unique way of making the meal]
[It will be great!]
[Cooking the stir-fried seafood on the grill]
You want it cut, right?
Yes, please
Even if you can eat it in 1 bite
[The owner is so sweet]
How can all of this fit in your stomach?
Thank you

I'll try this first
The previous spot seasoned it with red spice
This seems more soy sauce-based
The pork meat itself is very similar when it comes to its consistency and fat ratio
But totally different seasoning
With some kimchi this time
Its fat is the kill-point
Chewy and delicious
Let's try this as 3
Shrimp, webfoot octopus, cuttlefish
[Together]
Similar, but different ingredients
Different, but similar It's very unique
The movie "The Wailing" comes to mind when I think of Gokseong
I saw a lot of pretty street art
Beautiful scenery and railroads

Great place to visit for good food and sightings
The seasoning is not too strong It's just about right
It's perfect
I was worried that you'd get too full
Don't worry
-You're the 2nd prettiest person I know -What? Really?
1st=my wife 2nd=Tzuyang
[What a compliment!] Thank you
The food is great
[Where did all the food go?]
It was to watch her on YouTube, but I feel bad after seeing it in person
You feel bad? How come?
I wonder if you're really enjoying the food
Oh, I enjoy the food, I love it I digest really fast
[Incredible...]
I have this shrimp

It's cooked so well Perfect
Nothing left I must've eaten it all
You skip dinner, right?
Dinner? I always eat dinner
[Is that right?] [I don't even know]
Let's go to our next restaurant
[Where will be her final destination?]
I'm here at the last spot
Ta-da
[Gokseong Bon Tte] [Jeolla Province, Gokseong-gun]
Their menu...
They have gamjatang
I've been craving some soup all day
Excuse me
1 small-size gamjatang
2 servings of the Goblin Meal

Thank you
[A savior that will relieve you from all the greasiness]
[Gamjatang (Pork Backbone Stew)
[The way we do our Goblin Meal..]
[Is to cook it again on a charcoal grill]
[Plate it on top of scallions]
[The Goblin Meal]
How does she do mukbang?
[It doesn't make sense] She's so small
Thank you
You can lower the heat after it comes to a boil
I've been craving some soup
That's hearty
Very hearty
Lovely
This place gives you a lot of meat

This is 2 servings?
This place gives you 300g per serving
Other places usually give 150g
300g? That's really cheap
Soft
Delicious
1st one was red seasoning
2nd one was soy sauce seasoning
Then this is spicy soy sauce
I'm going to need some rice with this
Do you need something?
Do you have stone pot rice?
Yes, I'll take 1 of that
Thank you
[This is your 3rd meal... right?]
The longer it cooks, the more flavorful it gets

Look at all that cabbage leaf
A little bit of soup on here
The meat just melts in my mouth
With a bit of stickiness
[This is not her first meal] [It's her 3rd meal]
The Goblin Meal is great
The first restaurant offered either pork or beef
The second restaurant offered grilled fish or stir-fried seafood
You can enjoy it with gamjatang here
Like a hangover soup
Thank you
It's taro Taro rice
I guess they have a lot of taro here
Stone pot rice is the best
Pour some hot water in here
Close the lid

[See you later~]
It has chestnuts
So many bones and meat I'm so happy
[Get a big scoop with the cabbage leaf]
[Open sesame]
No steam?
That's a disappointment
This is no joke
Tasty
[Let's check up on her]
-How was the food? -It was great
The pork meat was chewy and tender
Gamjatang was amazing
We have been using our own recipe for 10 years now
I'm in charge of the gamjatang
She's in charge of the rest

You can only have the Goblin Meal here in Gokseong
[Time for advertisements]
Where did that come from?
This is Gokseong's representative brand
-Was it made in Gokseong? -Yes
Gokseong eatery
You can just microwave it to have it at home
Show us lots of support Thank you
I went to 3 restaurants today to try out their foods
The pork meal that I've been eating came out as a meal kit
You just microwave it
The portions are huge
It's 200g after it's cooked
Let's try one
That's good
A portion of the proceeds will be used as a fund for small businesses owners here in Gokseong

So please show lots of support
Thanks everyone!
[Come visit Gokseong, Jeollanam-do, a family village that's built in nature!] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
